meaning: n.利他主义者,爱他主义者
examples: The rich altruist made regular donations for homeless people.
The altruist, instead of continuing to perform selfless ACTS, will try to compel change in the offender.
I'm not buying the factory because I'm an altruist. I expect it to be making me a lot of money in a few years 'time.
This whopper is what the altruist code does to the intellects of those who internalize it.
Does this make him a closet altruist?
